author: Alice
title: Clean Git Branching & Rebase Standard
body: Always use 'git pull --rebase origin main' when updating your local feature branch to avoid messy merge commits. Before creating a PR, squash your commits into a single logical change with a descriptive message prefixing the task ID.

author: Bob
title: Async/Await Exception Handling in Express
body: Never let an async route handler go without a try/catch block, or use a wrapper handler that automatically forwards errors to the express error middleware. Uncaught promise rejections can crash the node process!
